data.title: Gradient Toxicologist Lindsey Borton is a finalist for 2026 Lush Prize supporting alternatives to animal-based testing.
data.description: In a recent announcement, it was revealed that Lindsey Borton, a Principal Toxicologist at Gradient, and Kelly Coleman, a scientist at Medtronic, have been selected as finalists for the prestigious Lush Prize in 2026. This award is dedicated to promoting non-animal testing methods within the scientific community. The recognition was made public on January 20, 2026, in Boston. Lindsey Borton's groundbreaking work has garnered attention in the field, highlighting the importance of advancing alternative testing approaches. Kelly Coleman's contributions at Medtronic also align with the ethos of the Lush Prize, which champions innovative techniques that reduce reliance on animal testing. The finalists showcase the commitment of these scientists to pushing boundaries and driving progress towards more ethical and effective research practices.

data.title: Cadence launches Estate Guard™ to protect assets post-death, helping families manage financial and digital accounts securely.
data.description: In Saskatchewan, a Canadian tech company called Cadence has introduced Estate Guard™, a specialized estate protection feature for the funeral and estate industry. This tool aids families in promptly identifying active financial and digital accounts of deceased individuals, reducing the risk of post-loss identity fraud. The technology is crucial in addressing this pressing concern impacting millions globally. Cadence's Estate Guard™ is designed to revolutionize how families and institutions handle post-loss matters and aims to mitigate potential risks associated with unresolved financial and digital accounts.

data.title: Global Electric Vehicle HVAC market valued at US$5.9 Billion in 2024, projected to reach US$9.8 Billion by 2030, growing at 8.8% CAGR. Comprehensive report available.
data.description: In Dublin, a recent report on the Electric Vehicle HVAC market has been incorporated into ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. It highlights that the sector was worth US$5.9 billion in 2024 and is estimated to climb to US$9.8 billion by 2030, indicating a 8.8% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) during the period from 2024 to 2030. The detailed analysis in the report covers market trends, influential factors, and future projections to assist in making well-informed business choices. This growth reflects the increasing adoption of electric vehicles.

data.title: Vitrolife Group to present Q4 and full year report 2025 on Feb 3, 2026 at 08:00 am CET, with an investor conference call at 10:00 am CET.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, Vitrolife AB (publ) is set to release its 2025 fourth quarter and full year report on February 3, 2026, at 08:00 am CET. An accompanying conference call will take place at 10:00 am CET on the same day, intended for investors, analysts, and financial media participants.

data.title: Arora Engineers acquires J.A. Watts, LLC, expanding aviation solutions; JWI is a program and construction management firm.
data.description: Arora Engineers, a leading infrastructure solutions company, recently acquired J.A. Watts, LLC (JWI), a program and construction management firm headquartered in Chicago with multiple offices throughout North America. The acquisition was made public on January 20, 2026, aided by support from Jacmel Partners. Arora, supported by Jacmel Partners, operates on a global scale and this strategic move enhances their presence in the industry.

data.title: Estuary Power completed Escape Solar and Storage project, now supplying 185MW of solar energy and 400MWh of battery to MGM Resorts.
data.description: In January 20, 2026, Estuary Power announced the successful completion of its Escape Solar and Storage project in Lincoln County, Nevada. The project, finalized in December 2025, is now providing 185 MW of solar energy and features a storage capacity of 400 MWh.

data.title: ATTOM acquires ResiShares to enhance data and analytics platform. Acquisition includes key assets of ResiShares.
data.description: ATTOM, an industry leader in land, property data, and real estate analytics based in Irvine, California, disclosed on January 20, 2026, that it has bolstered its AI-powered data and analytics capabilities by acquiring essential assets from ResiShares. This acquisition is set to enhance ATTOM's already comprehensive suite of services. Details regarding the specific assets acquired and the financial terms of the transaction were not disclosed in the announcement. The move signifies ATTOM's strategic growth and commitment to providing top-notch data and analytics solutions to its clients.

data.title: IBM and Recording Academy collaborate for new watsonx digital experiences for 2026 Grammy Awards, GRAMMY® IQ debuts. ARMONK, NY, Jan. 20, 2026 - IBM (NYSE: IBM) partners with Grammy Awards®, Official AI & Cloud Partner for nearly a decade.
data.description: ARMONK, N.Y. - IBM, listed as NYSE: IBM, has been the Official Artificial Intelligence (AI) & Cloud Partner of the Grammy Awards® for almost ten years. Recently, they unveiled GRAMMY® IQ, created with IBM Watsonx, right before the 2026 Grammy Awards®. This tool aims to provide enhanced analytics and insights for the music industry.

data.title: Mercury Insurance debunks auto insurance myths in 'Volume Two,' aiming to educate drivers on misconceptions. Los Angeles, Jan. 20, 2026 - PRNewswire.
data.description: A recently released report, titled "Volume Two," addresses common misconceptions that drivers should be aware of before making decisions about their insurance coverage. Despite the abundance of misinformation surrounding auto insurance, many drivers are making choices based on obsolete or incorrect beliefs. This report aims to assist consumers in understanding key details to ensure they have accurate information when deciding on their coverage. The report was published on January 20, 2026, in Los Angeles. It sheds light on critical information that could impact drivers' insurance choices, emphasizing the importance of staying informed about insurance matters. This initiative is crucial as it seeks to rectify the prevalence of misperceptions among consumers. It provides valuable insights for individuals navigating the complexities of auto insurance to make more informed decisions. Through this report, drivers can equip themselves with essential knowledge to optimize their insurance selections, ultimately promoting better understanding and decision-making.

data.title: Newmark Group facilitates sale of 265 East 66th Street in NYC, marking third-highest price per unit in NYC since 2021 for buildings over 100 units.
data.description: In NYC, a recent sale has made headlines as the third-highest price per unit paid for buildings with 100 or more units since 2021. The transaction took place on January 20, 2026, with Newmark Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: NMRK) leading as the commercial real estate advisor. The significance of this sale lies in the impressive price paid, reflecting the continuous growth and investment in the real estate sector.

data.title: Experienced insurance partner Frank Monaco joins Latham & Watkins in New York. Adds expertise in corporate insurance sector.
data.description: Renowned industry expert Frank Monaco has recently joined Latham & Watkins LLP in New York, bringing extensive experience and a successful history in the corporate insurance sector. The addition of Monaco, effective January 20, 2026, enhances the firm's already impressive capabilities in this field.

data.title: Scientific Games partners with LEIA to provide digital games to 5 European lotteries. ATLANTA, Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: Scientific Games has been chosen as the digital partner for Lotteries Entertainment Innovation Alliance (LEIA), a coalition of five top European lotteries. The company will provide digital game projects to the group. The announcement was made in Atlanta on January 20, 2026. LEIA aims to enhance lottery offerings for customers with the expertise of Scientific Games.

data.title: Kenneth Kecskes, with 30 years of experience, joins Cox, Castle & Nicholson as Partner, a leading real estate law firm.
data.description: In San Francisco, Cox, Castle & Nicholson LLP, a renowned law firm focusing on real estate in the US, revealed the addition of Kenneth Kecskes as a Partner. With close to 30 years of expertise in real estate and land use law, Ken has supported clients across various intricate transactional and entitlement issues across the state. He has guided clients on significant mixed-use master-planned community development and financing projects.

data.title: Persistent Systems reported $422.5M revenue in Q3 FY26 with 17.3% Y-o-Y growth, declares dividend of ₹22 per share.
data.description: Persistent Systems, headquartered in Santa Clara, California and Pune, India, declared an interim dividend of ₹22 per share on January 20, 2026. The company, listed on the BSE under 533179 and on the NSE as PERSISTENT, released its audited financial results for the quarter ending December 31, 2025, approved by the Board of Directors. In the mentioned quarter, they reported consolidated revenues of INR 37,782.1 million (USD 422.5 million), showcasing a sequential Q-o-Q growth of 4.0% and a year-over-year Y-o-Y growth of 17.3% in constant currency terms. The EBIT stood at INR 6,317.8 million, reflecting an increase in margin percentage and growth compared to the previous quarter and the same period of the preceding year, excluding the one-time impact of New Labour Codes. For more detailed information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: WestKam Gold Corp. reports soil sampling results for Will Property in BC, conducted in Sep 2025, on Mt. Williams near Goldbridge, BC.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, WestKam Gold Corp. released findings from a helicopter-assisted soil sampling survey done on the Will Claim. The survey, carried out in September 2025, targeted gossanous areas with altered ultramafics on the Company’s wholly-owned Will Project near Goldbridge, BC. The survey aimed to assess potential mineral deposits on the property.
